title: The Third Soul
content:
After fight with 
Lian Daofei
, The Seven-Colored Immortal Sovereign 
Su Dao
 splitted into 3 Main Souls and 7 Soul Fragments.

The Third Soul reincarnated hundreds times to become mortals, cultivators, beasts even tree.

One of incarnation of The Third Soul is a mortal, Grand Scholar of Zhao (also named Su Dao), 
Wang Lin
 teacher in his Dream Dao to reach the Third Step; this dream/illusion was unexpectedly mixed to (become) reality in the past time.

The last incarnation of The Third Soul is 
Xie Qing
, a honorary disciple of 
Wang Lin
.
